dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses cascade logic: (1) Initial trigger: sma_5 crosses sma_20, (2) Confirmation within 5 bars: sma_20 crosses sma_50, (3) Volume confirmation required. Context-dependent direction handled via separate entry_long and entry_short branches. Exit conditions use the cascade reversal (20/50 MA cross) as primary exit, with fixed 2% stop loss applied. Vol_ratio_20 used for volume confirmation (normalized volume indicator).

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses cascade logic: (1) Initial trigger: sma_5 crosses sma_20, (2) Confirmation within 5 bars: sma_20 crosses sma_50, (3) Volume confirmation required. Context-dependent direction handled via separate entry_long and entry_short branches. Exit conditions use the cascade reversal (20/50 MA cross) as primary exit, with fixed 2% stop loss applied. Vol_ratio_20 used for volume confirmation (normalized volume indicator).

source_rule_text: A trader should enter trend-following positions when initial price movements trigger progressively less sensitive cascade signals, capturing momentum from positive feedback loops before they dissipate.
